They are arbitrary ranges designed to demonstrate the concept of confidence intervals widening with higher confidence levels, acknowledging the inherent uncertainty in short-term stock movements. These numbers should NOT be used for any financial decision-making, as they do not reflect actual market conditions or professional financial advice.
